steps.title: Identify y-intercept condition
steps.content:
The graph crosses the y-axis where $ x = 0 $. Substitute $ x = 0 $ into the equation: $$ y = \left( rac{8}{13} ight)^{0+1} = \left( rac{8}{13} ight)^1 = rac{8}{13} $$

All y-intercepts have the form $ (0, y) $.

steps.title: Match to answer format
steps.content:
The point is $ (0, rac{8}{13}) $.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
